name_cn:
Authentic Grade Replica Fendi
💗Large Monogram
Brand new FEND1 First is here!!
Designed under Kim Jones, this is the first FEND1, overturning the previous bag shape. The metal trim and large Logo lock, combined with the body design, fuse architectural deconstruction with fashion. Elegant yet cool, it grabs attention instantly! Perfect for clutching at evening events, and also gives a high-end street chic vibe when slung!
Large size 32.5x15x23.5cm
